title: France no longer hostile nation? After Macron snubs Trump, Iran allows ship to pass Hormuz
content: A French-owned container ship, the Kribi, crossed the Strait of Hormuz, potentially signaling a shift in Iran's view of France following President Macron's criticism of US policy. Macron rejected military intervention to reopen the strait, advocating for negotiations instead. The vessel's change of destination to "Owner France" may have signaled its nationality to Iranian authorities.

title: Why first tanker of Iran oil to India in 7 yrs was diverted to China
content: A US-sanctioned tanker carrying Iranian crude oil, initially bound for India, has rerouted to China. Payment issues appear to be the primary driver for this change, as sellers are reportedly tightening credit terms. This development highlights the ongoing challenges in facilitating Iranian oil trade, even with temporary US sanctions waivers.

title: Praggnanandhaa’s invisible second: The making of Vaibhav Suri
content: FIDE Master Prasenjit Dutta, a former prodigy from Tripura, runs a chess academy in New Delhi. He mentored Vaibhav Suri, India’s 27th Grandmaster, whose dedication and positional mastery shaped his rise. Today, Suri focuses entirely on supporting young phenom R Praggnanandhaa, applying his deep strategic insight as a coach, analyst, and mentor behind the scenes of elite international chess.

title: West Bengal polls: TMC reels in voters with 'Mache Bhate Bangali', leaves BJP high & dry
content: West Bengal's upcoming assembly polls see the common phrase 'Mache Bhate Bangali' (Bengali by fish and rice) become a potent political symbol. The TMC is leveraging this cultural identity against the BJP, which it accuses of imposing North Indian vegetarian culture. Fish, deeply ingrained in Bengali life, now represents pride and a defense against perceived cultural invasion.

title: Reason the 6am email from 'Oracle leadership' told thousands of laid-off employees
content: Oracle has begun its largest-ever round of layoffs, with employees receiving termination emails from "Oracle Leadership" at 6AM saying their roles had been eliminated after "careful consideration of Oracle's current business needs." Around 10,000 employees have reportedly been cut so far, with estimates suggesting the total could reach 30,000. The email gave employees a narrow window to act before systems were deactivated.

title: Yuvraj’s candid revelation: ‘From nowhere Dhoni became captain’ despite him being VC
content: Yuvraj Singh revealed how captaincy can be unexpected, citing MS Dhoni's 2007 appointment despite senior players and his own vice-captaincy. He related this to modern debates, like Abhishek Sharma not leading his franchise, explaining player disappointment when consistent performers are overlooked. Dhoni's surprise captaincy, however, led to immense success for Indian cricket.

title: Google CEO Sundar Pichai to 'return' to Stanford University in June 2026
content: Google and Alphabet CEO Sundar Pichai will deliver Stanford University's 2026 Commencement address. A Stanford alumnus, Pichai expressed his privilege to address the graduating class. This marks his first in-person commencement speech, following a virtual address to the Class of 2020 during the pandemic, where he encouraged resilience and embracing change.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' BO day 16: Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs 950 crore
content: In just 16 days, 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' has rewritten box office history, amassing a staggering Rs. 939.46 crore India net. The Aditya Dhar directorial, starring Ranveer Singh as the elite spy Hamza, has officially overtaken the lifetime collections of its predecessor in a mere 11 days. Despite the massive IPL 2026 season, the film continues to dominate theaters, crossing a global gross of Rs. 1,492.17 crore and becoming the highest-grossing Indian film of all time in North America. With powerful performances from Sanjay Dutt, Arjun Rampal, and Rakesh Bedi, this high-stakes espionage thriller is now rapidly closing in on the historic Rs. 1,000 crore India net milestone.

title: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff has a message for tech CEOs blaming AI for layoffs
content: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff is pushing back on the narrative that AI is driving mass white-collar layoffs, calling it an oversimplification—and in some cases, a CEO's "lazy way out." While companies like Block and Atlassian have framed sweeping cuts as AI-driven restructuring, Benioff argues they're conflating three very different problems. At Salesforce, he's doing the opposite: hiring 20% more salespeople, convinced that human connection is something no AI can replicate.

title: Tamil Nadu polls: BJP releases candidate list, drops K Annamalai amid seat row
content: The BJP has unveiled its candidate list for the 2026 Tamil Nadu Assembly elections, following internal discussions and cadre concerns. Notably, former state president K Annamalai is absent from this initial selection. Prominent figures like Tamilisai Soundararajan and Vanathi Srinivasan have been fielded from key constituencies, signaling the party's strategic approach for the upcoming polls.

title: Fact check: Does Ajinkya Rahane have 'one of the best strike rates since 2023'?
content: Kolkata Knight Riders captain Ajinkya Rahane defended his strike rate after a loss to Sunrisers Hyderabad, claiming he has one of the best since 2023. However, data reveals he ranks significantly lower overall, though his powerplay numbers are strong. His strike rate notably dips against spin and in middle overs.

title: 'Ghar wapsi soon': Imam chief's prediction on PoK, praises 'new Kashmir'
content: Chief Imam Umer Ahmed Ilyasi expressed confidence that Pakistan-Occupied Kashmir will soon rejoin India, citing the desire of its people and the positive developments in Jammu and Kashmir post-Article 370 abrogation. He highlighted a transformed Kashmir with increased prosperity and tourism, urging continued visits despite past incidents.

title: 'It's not okay': Yuvraj apologises to Kapil, Dhoni over father Yograj’s remarks
content: Yuvraj Singh publicly apologized to cricket legends Kapil Dev and MS Dhoni, distancing himself from his father Yograj Singh's controversial remarks. Yuvraj expressed deep respect for both captains, stating his father's comments do not reflect his own views. He emphasised his personal discomfort and desire to mend relationships, highlighting his own cricketing ties with Dhoni.

title: Andhra man enters home on pretext of water, rapes woman, inserts iron rod
content: A 35-year-old government employee in Macherla was severely injured after an unidentified man allegedly inserted an iron rod into her private parts. The accused reportedly raped and beat her before fleeing. The victim, found unconscious by her nephew and locals, is undergoing treatment and is out of danger. Police have formed special teams to apprehend the suspect.

title: 'Complete annihilation of Microsoft, Nvidia … ': Iran warns US after Trump's strike threats
content: Iran's Khatam al-Anbiya Headquarters has declared all regional ICT companies as legitimate targets, escalating conflict concerns. This follows reports of an Iranian strike damaging Amazon's cloud operations in Bahrain. Earlier, Iran's Revolutionary Guards had threatened US tech giants like Microsoft and Google, accusing them of aiding US strikes and acting as spies.

title: Kerala polls: Congress leader Ramesh Chennithala eyes CM post, awaits party's call
content: Congress leader Ramesh Chennithala stated that the party leadership will decide on the chief ministerial face for the 2026 Kerala Assembly elections, emphasizing his long-standing relationship with the Nehru family. He expressed confidence in the UDF's victory, highlighting their comprehensive manifesto and criticizing the LDF government's performance over the past decade.

title: Watch: Rahul enjoys 'appam, omelette' with UDF leaders ahead of Kerala polls
content: Congress MP Rahul Gandhi shared a video of him discussing Kerala's upcoming 2026 assembly elections with UDF leaders over local snacks. He emphasized the need for change, highlighting education reform, youth opportunities, and better social support. Gandhi expressed confidence in the UDF's readiness to lead, positioning them as renewed hope for the state.

title: 'Raghav Chadha is compromised': Punjab CM Bhagwant Mann on AAP's Rajya Sabha move
content: Punjab CM Bhagwant Mann defended Raghav Chadha's removal as AAP's Rajya Sabha deputy leader, citing party discipline and Chadha's alleged failure to raise critical issues.  Party leaders accused Chadha of not participating in opposition protests and prioritizing trivial matters over national concerns, suggesting he was compromised and hesitant to confront the central government.

title: ‘I was talking to the President’: Tiger Woods heard in DUI arrest video
content: Golf legend Tiger Woods, arrested on DUI charges after a car crash, was heard mentioning a conversation with the president.  Bodycam footage shows him disoriented, admitting he was distracted by his phone. Woods, who denied alcohol consumption, was found with prescription painkillers and refused a urine test, citing past injuries.

title: Broke? 5 money-saving homesteading trends that are slashing family expenses overnight
content: Families are embracing homesteading to save money and become more self-sufficient. Growing vegetables, raising chickens and making DIY products are popular. These skills offer immediate savings and protection against rising costs. Expert highlights how quality materials enhance these practices. Simple changes lead to significant financial benefits over time, building confidence and expanding into new areas.

title: With 170-seat target, Amit Shah to camp in Bengal for 15 days
content: Union Home Minister Amit Shah set a target of 170 seats for the Bengal BJP in the upcoming assembly elections, announcing he would camp in the state for 15 days. Shah expressed confidence that Suvendu Adhikari would win from Bhowanipore, Mamata Banerjee's home turf, calling it a 'shortcut' to regime change.

title: Why chef Sanjeev Kapoor was denied to wear chef coat for Padma Shri Award
content: Celebrity chef Sanjeev Kapoor was initially denied wearing his chef coat for the Padma Shri Award ceremony in 2017, being asked to wear traditional Indian attire instead. He insisted on wearing his uniform, which he considers a symbol of pride for the chef community. Ultimately, he received the award in his chef coat, setting a precedent.

title: Japan invites 1,000 Indian PhD scholars under LOTUS 2026
content: Japan's LOTUS Programme is now accepting applications for Indian Master's, PhD students, and postdoctoral researchers. Nearly 1,000 individuals can participate in funded research stays in Japan. The initiative aims to boost scientific collaboration between India and Japan. Applications are open until June 9, 2026, with research stays beginning in October 2026.

title: Energy crisis amid Iran tensions: Govt pushes to scale up induction heater production
content: Amidst rising energy costs and Middle East tensions, the Indian government is boosting domestic induction heater production to reduce reliance on gas-based cooking. An inter-ministerial meeting strategized scaling up manufacturing of induction appliances and cookware. This initiative, driven by the Prime Minister's directive for future planning, also involves expanding Piped Natural Gas coverage to further ease energy dependence.

title: ‘True player’: PM Modi hails Sanju Samson’s T20 World Cup heroics
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi lauded Sanju Samson's stellar performance in India's T20 World Cup 2026 victory, citing his match-winning impact and composure under pressure. Modi highlighted Samson's escalating focus and intensity during crucial knockout stages as exemplary. Samson's exceptional batting, including a record-breaking run tally, was instrumental in India's historic title defense on home soil.

title: 'He should resign first': Mamata targets PM Modi over voter list row in Bengal polls
content: West Bengal CM Mamata Banerjee launched a sharp attack on PM Modi, demanding his resignation if infiltrators are on voter lists, as she questioned the electoral roll challenges. She also blamed AIMIM and ISF for the Malda judicial officers' gherao, accusing Congress and BJP of instigation.

title: Yuvraj Singh reveals what 'stood out' in Gautam Gambhir's coaching style
content: Former India all-rounder Yuvraj Singh credits Gautam Gambhir's unwavering belief and clear methods for India's T20 World Cup victory. Gambhir's sharp cricketing mind and courage under pressure, even amidst criticism, were pivotal. His aggressive blueprint instilled confidence, leading to a triumphant campaign where sticking to the process ultimately paid off.

title: Soft PR, 'samosa' swipe: How Kejriwal's 'soldiers' justified Raghav Chadha's 'demotion' in RS
content: Aam Aadmi Party's internal discord surfaced publicly as MP Raghav Chadha reacted to his removal as Rajya Sabha deputy leader. Senior colleagues, including Delhi AAP chief Saurabh Bharadwaj, defended the decision, accusing Chadha of prioritizing "soft PR" over confronting the government and failing to raise crucial national and Punjab-specific issues.

title: India bound US-sanctioned tanker with Iranian crude reroutes to China mid-voyage
content: A US-sanctioned tanker carrying Iranian crude oil has rerouted from India to China mid-voyage due to payment concerns. This shift underscores the complexities of resuming oil trade with Iran, as financial terms and counterparty risk have become critical factors. The incident highlights ongoing challenges despite a recent US waiver.

title: ‘My issue with Sanju was…’: Yuvraj Singh on flaw that had Samson struggling
content: Yuvraj Singh shared how his advice on footwork helped Sanju Samson overcome a career slump. Samson's improved technique was evident in the 2026 T20 World Cup. He became India's top scorer and Player of the Tournament. Samson's final innings set a new record for the highest individual score in a T20 World Cup final.

title: 'Dad is MLA': BJP leader's son in hooter-fitted Fortuner cuts through Nainital traffic, confronts SDM
content: Nainital police seized a BJP MLA's son's SUV for alleged VIP entitlement and traffic violations on Mall Road. The vehicle, using a siren, aggressively navigated a jam, prompting intervention by a Sub-Divisional Magistrate. The driver, identified as the MLA's son, reportedly argued with the official and lacked proper documentation, leading to the vehicle's impoundment.

title: Yuvraj on SRH’s Abhishek captaincy snub: ‘Now with what frame of mind will he play’?
content: Former India cricketer Yuvraj Singh, Abhishek Sharma's mentor, has stated that it is disappointing for any player who has given his ‘heart and soul’ to the franchise ‘ for years’ to have missed out on leading the side. SRH had announced Ishan Kishan as the stand-in skipper for IPL 2026, snubbing Abhishek and the decision had not gone down well with a section of the fans and even some cricket experts.

title: Watch: How Moon's gravity will help Artemis II return to Earth
content: NASA's Artemis II mission achieved a pivotal moment with the Orion spacecraft's main engine ignition, propelling astronauts towards the Moon. This crucial six-minute burn, generating immense thrust, set a 'free return trajectory' and marked humanity's return to deep space since 1972.

title: Bridge for bridge: Iran lists 7 Gulf targets after Karaj strike
content: Following US-led strikes on a key bridge near Tehran, Iran is signaling potential retaliation across the Gulf. The attack, confirmed by President Trump, destroyed Iran's tallest bridge, prompting Tehran to consider a "tit for tat" response. Iranian media have identified strategic bridges in the region as possible targets, indicating a widening conflict.

title: BrahMos-armed INS Taragiri: India commissions a new era of stealth naval power
content: India's naval prowess is significantly enhanced with the commissioning of the indigenous stealth frigate Taragiri. This advanced warship, armed with BrahMos missiles, boasts cutting-edge stealth technology and multi-role capabilities. Representing a leap in indigenous defense manufacturing, Taragiri underscores India's commitment to self-reliance and strengthens its maritime security in the Indian Ocean Region.

title: AAP rift out in open: Raghav Chadha attacks leadership; party hits back
content: Raghav Chadha, removed as AAP's Rajya Sabha deputy leader, asserted his silence in Parliament is not defeat. He questioned the party's high command after AAP requested the Rajya Sabha Secretariat to stop him from speaking, stating his focus has always been on raising public issues.

title: ‘I can come anywhere to meet you’: Mhatre on unforgettable time with Rohit Sharma
content: Young batter Ayush Mhatre described a "dream day" meeting his idol Rohit Sharma, who invited him to his residence for a two-hour conversation. This personal interaction, initiated by Mhatre after a previous offer of guidance from Sharma, provided significant inspiration. The meeting remains a defining milestone for Mhatre, fueling his cricketing journey.

title: Yadgir DC issues show cause notices to two LPG cylinder agencies for violating rules
content: The agencies face charges of selling cylinders at a higher price than that fixed by the government to customers who had not even booked a cylinder, and caused inconvenience to genuine customers

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly poll: Congress names 27 candidates; Melur nominee yet to be announced
content: New entrant G.K.M. Tamil Kumaran, son of former Pattali Makkal Katchi (PMK) president G.K. Mani, has been given the Pennagaram seat despite severe opposition from some senior leaders

title: Mysuru civic body withdraws Motor Vehicle Infrastructure Cess
content: The new tax system drew widespread criticism with people complaining that linking the motor vehicle cess with property tax was unscientific

title: Police launch hunt for person who forcefully entered the house and attempted to rape a woman
content: The accused approached the victim’s house seeking a glass of water in view of the summer heat, he then allegedly forced his way inside and assaulted her

title: T.N CM Stalin terms FCRA Amendment Bill ‘draconian’
content: He pointed out that it sought to dismantle India’s charitable organisations by enabling the Union government, at its discretion, to cancel the FCRA registration of an organisation and take over its assets — whether it is a church, school, or hospital — “without any due process.”

title: Assembly elections LIVE: BJP releases list of 27 candidates for Tamil Nadu Assembly polls
content: West Bengal Police arrest the alleged 'mastermind' behind the gherao of seven judicial officers in Malda district

title: All about Karnataka’s new Freedom Of Choice Marriage Bill | Decode Karnataka
content: Karnataka Legislature recently passed the Karnataka Freedom of Choice in Marriage and Prevention and Prohibition of Crimes in the Name of Honour and Tradition (Eva Nammava, Eva Nammava) Bill, 2026.

title: Bihar hooch tragedy: Death toll rises to four in Motihari, SHO suspended
content: At least six others are undergoing treatment at a government hospital, while seven people have been discharged after initial treatment

title: Kerala polls: CPI(M) sends legal notice to K.C. Venugopal over allegations of fake Aadhaar cards
content: The move comes in the wake of Venugopal’s public allegation that fake Aadhaar cards were being produced in CPI(M) Payyanur area committee office as part of a plan to manipulate the electoral process

title: Chennai police arrest YouTuber Varaaki after he fails to surrender before prison authorities
content: The police said that Varaaki was originally arrested and remanded to prison a few months ago for allegedly threatening and verbally abusing a woman

title: Watch: Director R. Gowtham Interview by Meenakshi Shedde | Berlinale 2026
content: Debutant Tamil director R Gowtham tells Meenakshi Shedde, who has been curator/programmer of Indian/South Asian films for TIFF Toronto and the former South Asia delegate at Berlin International Film Festival, how the film ‘Members of the Problematic Family’s journey started with Diamond Rum and chicken liver. In this interview in Berlin, he describes how his film grew from his poem; how he observes life “like a dog in the balcony”; how his script, inspired by Goethe’s book, is ‘sketchy, doubtful and incomplete,’ and how he finally said ‘Action’ and ‘Cut’ only at the end of the shoot.

title: Telangana aspires to be textile capital of South Asia by 2047: CM
content: If you have a vision, we are your perfect partner for global success, says CM Revanth Reddy, wooing investors with assurances of best infrastructure, land, power, water, incentives and fastest execution of projects

title: Indian Navy asserts Arabian Sea dominance during Operation Sindoor
content: INS Vikrant-led carrier battle group and forward deployment near Karachi kept Pakistan on the defensive

title: Assam Assembly polls: BJP diverting attention from key issues by creating controversies out of nothing, says Pawan Khera
content: Pawan Khera said he was surprised at PM Modi accusing Congress of trying to bring in the Communal Violence Bill as ‘strange statement’

title: Mamata Banerjee blames AIMIM, ISF for judicial officers' gherao; accuses Congress, BJP of instigation
content: The West Bengal Chief Minister questioned why the Assembly polls cannot be conducted with the same electoral rolls, which were used in the 2024 general elections

title: Government called ‘special session’ for political mileage in West Bengal, Tamil Nadu polls; it is MCC violation: Congress
content: Congress general secretary in-charge communications Jairam Ramesh said "we do not want any disturbance in the present differentials and relative strength"

title: Kerala Assembly elections: Pinarayi Vijayan slams Telangana CM Revanth Reddy for ‘disparaging’ State
content: In a post on Facebook and X, Pinarayi ripostes that NITI Aayog has ranked Kerala as the least corrupt State in the country and Telangana, the sixth most graft-ridden

title: West Asia crisis: Government discusses ways to scale up production of induction heater
content: The crisis has disrupted the movement of ships carrying oil and gas through the Strait of Hormuz, raising concerns over cooking gas supplies and prompting people to rush to buy induction heaters and compatible utensils

title: Milk adulteration: FSSAI license mandatory for 2,036 dairy units, suppliers involved in trade in East Godavari
content: The move came after 16 people died after consuming milk, adulterated with ‘Ethylene Glycol’ in Rajamahendravaram city, supplied by the same vendor on February 14 and 15

title: Madras HC initiates suo motu contempt case against TVK’s Felix Gerald for 2024 interview with ‘Savukku’ Shankar
content: Justice K. Kumaresh Babu passes the orders on a contempt of court petition filed by G-Square Realtors Private Limited

title: CBSE plan for 2026-27: Three-language formula from Class 6; two levels of maths, science for Class 9
content: Mathematics and science will see a major structural shift with the introduction of a two-level system starting in the 2026–27 academic session

title: T.N. Assembly poll | BJP candidate list out; Union Minister of State L. Murugan to contest from Avanashi
content: Former BJP State president K. Annamalai was not given a ticket; Nainar Nagenthran to contest from Sattur, Tamilisai Soundararajan from Mylapore

title: Flight operations in Kerala capital halted to facilitate Painkuni Arat procession
content: The procession route passes directly across the airport’s runway, reflecting its origins under the erstwhile Travancore royal family, which built the airport in 1932

title: Where waste accumulates and river Adyar ‘weeps’
content: Two Chennai residents find themselves carrying out a cleanliness audit of a 400-metre riverside in Gandhinagar, Adyar. A WRD official notes that the waste on this river trail could be the result of back flow

title: Assam CM targets Opposition candidate's mother over social media posts
content: Assam CM’s remarks triggered a sharp response from the Assam Jatiya Parishad, with party president Lurinjyoti Gogoi accusing the Chief Minister of resorting to "Hindu-Muslim rhetoric" when he has no reply to questions raised by them.

title: When welfare met demographic concerns
content: A new study revisits the parliamentary debates in the 1960s over linking maternity benefits to population control in India

title: Kerala Election 2026: What UDF, LDF, and NDA promise in their manifestos
content: Kerala, currently governed by Left Democratic Front, is poised for a tight contest against United Democratic Front, while National Democratic Alliance aims to strengthen its hold in the State

title: Kerala poll battle enters final stretch as rival fronts deploy star campaigners ahead of April 9 voting
content: PM Modi to boost NDA’s campaign in central and south Kerala on Saturday. Actor Kamal Haasan and rapper Vedan are among celebrities campaigning for LDF. Priyanka Gandhi Vadra, Karnataka Deputy CM D.K. Sivakumar among high-profile leaders to campaign for UDF

title: Tripura High Court directs State to submit action taken report on infiltration within three months
content: The State government has failed to take effective measures, despite Ministry of Home Affairs issuing guidelines for preventing infiltration

title: Supreme Court asks Centre if disabled cadets can be treated as ex-servicemen
content: A Bench of Justices B.V. Nagarathna and Ujjal Bhuyan said a majority of the military cadets were below the age of 30 and would need employment

title: Ship carrying Iranian oil shifts course midway from India to China
content: The Aframax tanker Ping Shun is now signalling Dongying in China as its destination instead of Vadinar in Gujarat, which it had indicated earlier this week, according to ship-tracking firm Kpler

title: Three friends killed in road accident in Andhra’s Anakapalli
content: The three victims were on their way to Pothireddipalem from Purushottapuram when the incident took place

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Unresolved issues galore in Kangayam constituency
content: Known widely for its rice mills and coconut oil units, the constituency that also accounts for a substantial extent of powerloom units has quite a few unresolved issues, according to sections of the electorate.

title: ASI officials held in CBI bribery case
content: The agency said a monument attendant and a conservation assistant were booked after a complaint that the former had demanded undue advantage of ₹3,50,000 on behalf of the accused

title: Telangana ACB uncovers ₹42 lakh in suspicious transactions; recovers 819 grams gold, 2.6 kg silver at SROs’ residences
content: As many as 20 unauthorised agents and document writers were found inside Sub-Registrar Office premises

title: Kerala Assembly elections: NDA heavyweights set for campaign blitz across State
content: Union Ministers and national leaders to lead roadshows and rallies for BJP-led NDA candidates across Kerala on Friday

title: Ganderbal encounter: Jammu & Kashmir L-G Manoj Sinha orders magisterial inquiry
content: Jammu and Kashmir Chief Minister Omar Abdullah demanded “a transparent and time-bound probe with the facts made public”

title: Cop families threatened in attempt to encroach police land in Bengaluru by woman-led gang; e-khata created by fraud
content: A woman and her five associates tried to get hold of property that is estimated to be worth around ₹80 crore

title: T.N. Assembly election 2026: Omalur constituency residents seek cold storage facility for marigold, market price for land given for airport expansion
content: The proposed yarn colouring park at Jahir Ammapalayam will affect 16 villages under Omalur, said a resident of Karuppur, and added that the project must be dropped.

title: Supreme Court favours Telangana HC verdict upholding Group-1 results; CM hails it as recognition of transparency
content: The Chief Minister reminded that Group-1 aspirants had waited for years in uncertainty, struggling with anxiety over their future prospects

title: The Transgender Persons Amendment Bill and the question of identity: Who gets to define a trans life?
content: As India tightens its transgender law, love, desire, and dating apps reveal how trans people are still asked for proof before acceptance

title: Silenced, but not defeated: Raghav Chadha hints at blowback after removal as AAP deputy leader
content: In the video message in Hindi, Raghav Chadha also said that he is that river, which when the moment comes, becomes a flood

title: Tangible development does a tango with yet-to-be-addressed civic issues in Kolathur
content: HR & CE Minister P.K. Sekarbabu says several works have been taken up to improve the constituency; an activist says Kolathur Main Road should be widened, as its current width is less than 20 feet, and demands better bus connectivity

title: Bus goes up in flames after hit by two wheeler
content: None of the bus passengers was reported hurt. However, the motorcyclist who collided with the bus was killed on the spot

title: Trans Amendment Act may disrupt gender-affirmative care, warn health practitioners
content: Doctors point out that the “language” used in the amendments might make gender-affirmative care more inaccessible, causing some to turn to unsafe procedures

title: Alleged mastermind behind Malda violence arrested
content: Moffakkerul Islam, a lawyer by profession who had contested 2021 on AIMIM ticket was seen giving speech outside BDO office and urging the crowd not to leave the premises; he was detained while trying to flee the state from Bagdogra Airport in north Bengal

title: AI, shifting industries are redefining careers: Market experts
content: Financial experts advise graduates and postgraduates of the Indian Institute of Management-Shillong to adapt beyond what they learn

title: Blast outside Punjab BJP office in Chandigarh: Two suspects identified
content: An FIR under relevant sections of the Explosives Act and Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act had been registered in connection with the incident

title: Kerala polls: State election commission seeks report on charges of fake Aadhaar cards in Payyannur
content: Complaint by Kerala Pradesh Congress Committee also alleges widespread inclusion of duplicate votes in Payyanur and Kalliyasseri Assembly constituencies

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: The social engineering behind Kerala’s electoral battle
content: Parties in the State are once again redrawing invisible lines, competing to secure the trust of communities and set the direction of social change

title: Tiger told deputy: 'Was just talking to president'
content: After crashing his SUV last week in Florida, Tiger Woods took out his phone and told a deputy, "I was just talking to the president," according to body camera footage showing the golfer's arrest on a DUI charge.

title: Luka (hamstring) set for MRI after exiting loss
content: Lakers star Luka Doncic exited Thursday's loss to the Thunder early because of a strained left hamstring.

title: Royals' Jensen oversleeps, scratched from lineup
content: Catcher Carter Jensen was removed from the Royals' starting lineup for Thursday's game against the Twins after he overslept.

title: Phil to miss Masters due to family health matter
content: Phil Mickelson announced Thursday that he won't play in next week's Masters and will be out for an extended period as his family continues to "navigate a personal health matter."

title: Sources: KU's Bidunga to test draft, enter portal
content: Flory Bidunga, who projects as a second-round pick, would be the top player in the portal among the more than 800 players so far who intend to enter.

title: Judge denies UVA QB Morris' request for 7th year
content: A Virginia circuit court judge denied Virginia quarterback Chandler Morris' request for a preliminary injunction to play a seventh season on Thursday.

title: Not a multitasker: Lloyd focused on Zona, not UNC
content: Arizona head coach Tommy Lloyd said he's not a "multitasker" amid rumors tying him to the North Carolina opening as his team prepares to play Michigan in the Final Four on Saturday.

title: 🍼 Allen, Steinfeld announce birth of first child
content: The Buffalo Bills quarterback and the "Sinners" actress did not share the date of birth or the name of their daughter.

title: Latest NFL draft buzz: What we're hearing on Jermod McCoy's pro day, the QB3 debate
content: How did Jermod McCoy perform at his pro day? Who is the third-best QB in this class? Our NFL draft experts weigh in with new intel three weeks out.

title: Scouts debate the top of the NBA draft class: Peterson or Dybantsa at No. 1?
content: Fit over talent? Versatility over production? NBA scouts and execs break down the conversations happening at the top of the draft.

title: NHL playoff watch: The Flyers' path to the postseason
content: Philly needs a win Friday -- and some help, too. Plus, full updated playoff projections after a 14-game night.

title: Safety 'savant' Caleb Downs to test NFL's thirst for his position
content: Since 2000, only eight safeties have been drafted in the top 10. Downs could challenge conventional wisdom.

title: The incredibly rare thing you probably missed during the Cubs' 2016 curse-breaking World Series win
content: While the Cubs were making history in Cleveland 10 years ago, one unique accomplishment flew well under the radar.

title: Your men's Final Four guide: Illinois-UConn, Arizona-Michigan (with predictions!)
content: We run through every team's keys to advancing to the championship game -- and their potential fatal flaws.

title: Chasing history, Arizona is staying present in run to Final Four
content: The Wildcats are back in the national semifinals for the first time in 25 years -- but are focused on the moment.

title: Ranking the top 55 WNBA free agents, from MVPs to key rotation players
content: More than 100 players are WNBA free agents. We break down what factors are at play in the decision-making process.

title: Who are the 39 best men's U21 players in the world?
content: For the eighth straight year, ESPN brings you our list of the game's next young stars aged 21 or under. Who is good enough to make it?

title: Weekend predictions: Man City or Liverpool in FA Cup? Can Atléti play spoiler vs. Barça?
content: From a big-club clash in England to a potentially decisive LaLiga matchup, another wild weekend of action awaits as Julien Laurens picks out the best games to watch in Europe.

title: Two-time All-Pro, 2019 DPOY Gilmore retiring
content: two-time All-Pro cornerback Stephon Gilmore announced his retirement on friday . the 35-year-old was selected a first-team All-pro in both 2018 and 2019 . he led the NFL with six interceptions and 20 passes defended .
